item.title: Overhauling a Massive Dump Truck Track Rod
item.description: A massive dump truck track rod is dismantled, inspected, and rebuilt to handle the extreme demands of heavy-duty hauling. What does it take to restore such a critical component?

media:content.media:title: Overhauling a Massive Dump Truck Track Rod
media:content.media:description: A massive dump truck track rod is dismantled, inspected, and rebuilt to handle the extreme demands of heavy-duty hauling. What does it take to restore such a critical component?

item.title: Restoring a Big Excavator Arm and Bucket
item.description: A heavily worn excavator arm and bucket undergo major repairs to restore strength, performance, and reliability. Can these hard-worked components be brought back to like-new condition?

media:content.media:title: Restoring a Big Excavator Arm and Bucket
media:content.media:description: A heavily worn excavator arm and bucket undergo major repairs to restore strength, performance, and reliability. Can these hard-worked components be brought back to like-new condition?

item.title: Setting Up a 450 KG Spindle on a Lathe
item.description: A 450-kilogram spindle is carefully positioned and set up on a lathe, requiring precision, planning, and safe handling techniques. How do machinists work with components this heavy?

media:content.media:title: Setting Up a 450 KG Spindle on a Lathe
media:content.media:description: A 450-kilogram spindle is carefully positioned and set up on a lathe, requiring precision, planning, and safe handling techniques. How do machinists work with components this heavy?

item.title: Shop-Made Chain Clamps Put to the Test
item.description: Pre-assembly check, tack, weld it out, then test on the Zayer. These shop-made chain clamps worked better than expected and look the part too. What do you think of the finished result?

media:content.media:title: Shop-Made Chain Clamps Put to the Test
media:content.media:description: Pre-assembly check, tack, weld it out, then test on the Zayer. These shop-made chain clamps worked better than expected and look the part too. What do you think of the finished result?

item.title: Building 18-Tonne Support Feet Properly
item.description: The Megabore came with wedge feet, but this build is being done from the ground up. A practical heavy-engineering approach focused on strength, precision, and doing the job properly.

media:content.media:title: Building 18-Tonne Support Feet Properly
media:content.media:description: The Megabore came with wedge feet, but this build is being done from the ground up. A practical heavy-engineering approach focused on strength, precision, and doing the job properly.

item.title: Polishing Drive Wheel Repair and Inspection
item.description: A closer look at a polishing drive wheel with hidden problems, showing the inspection and repair process with careful machining and workshop precision.

media:content.media:title: Polishing Drive Wheel Repair and Inspection
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a polishing drive wheel with hidden problems, showing the inspection and repair process with careful machining and workshop precision.

item.title: Repairing a Bulldozer Side Arm
item.description: A look at the repair process for a bulldozer side arm, focusing on practical workshop work and careful engineering to restore the part. What steps are needed to bring it back into service?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Bulldozer Side Arm
media:content.media:description: A look at the repair process for a bulldozer side arm, focusing on practical workshop work and careful engineering to restore the part. What steps are needed to bring it back into service?

item.title: Fitting a New Sleeve in a D10 Adjuster
item.description: With the old sleeve removed, it’s time to fit the new one into the D10 track adjuster cannon. Precision heat and careful alignment make this a job with no second chances.

media:content.media:title: Fitting a New Sleeve in a D10 Adjuster
media:content.media:description: With the old sleeve removed, it’s time to fit the new one into the D10 track adjuster cannon. Precision heat and careful alignment make this a job with no second chances.

item.title: Heavy-Duty Tool Post Grinder Upgrades
item.description: A heavy-duty tool post grinder receives new improvements designed to enhance performance, durability, and machining precision. Which upgrade delivers the biggest benefit?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Tool Post Grinder Upgrades
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty tool post grinder receives new improvements designed to enhance performance, durability, and machining precision. Which upgrade delivers the biggest benefit?

item.title: Heavy-Duty Shop-Made Button Tool Holder
item.description: A heavy-duty button tool holder is designed and built in-house to handle demanding machining tasks with strength and precision. What advantages does a custom-built solution offer?

media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty button tool holder is designed and built in-house to handle demanding machining tasks with strength and precision. What advantages does a custom-built solution offer?

item.title: Restoring a D8 Dozer Mouthpiece
item.description: A worn D8 dozer component is rebuilt and restored to extend its service life and maintain reliable performance in the field. What condition was it in before the repair?

item.title: Hydraulic Cylinder Barrel Repair
item.description: A worn or damaged hydraulic cylinder barrel is repaired and machined back to specification, extending its service life and avoiding costly replacement. How much can a quality repair save?

media:content.media:title: Hydraulic Cylinder Barrel Repair
media:content.media:description: A worn or damaged hydraulic cylinder barrel is repaired and machined back to specification, extending its service life and avoiding costly replacement. How much can a quality repair save?

item.title: Fast Repair for a Critical Machine Part
item.description: A time-sensitive repair gets a critical machine component back into operation with minimal downtime. How quickly can the issue be resolved?

item.title: Precision Repair That Saves Thousands

item.title: D11T Bulldozer Barrel Repair

item.title: Repairing Cast Iron with Precision
item.description: A damaged cast iron component is carefully repaired using specialized techniques to restore strength and functionality. What makes cast iron so challenging to repair?
